children.heading: Administration by agreement with other agency or agencies
children.label: a Administration by agreement with other agency or agencies
children.text: The Secretary may administer any or all of the provisions of this part through Memorandum of Agreement with the head of any appropriate Federal agency.

children.heading: Regulations
children.label: b Regulations
children.text: The head of the agency administering this part or provisions thereof (including any agency head administering such Act or provisions through a Memorandum of Agreement under subsection (a)) may promulgate such implementing regulations as may be found necessary and appropriate. Initial implementing regulations may be interim final regulations.1So in original. Probably should be “part”.1
